mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, role FROM demouser
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO demouser(username, password, role) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{role})
mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, role FROM demouser WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, username, password, role FROM demouser WHERE username = #{username}
mapper.update: UPDATE demouser SET password = #{password} WHERE username = #{username}
